title: Tyre & Fuel Efficiency Intelligence
subtitle: Quantify fuel loss from tyre condition · scientific impact modelling · savings calculator

disclosure.title: Modelled estimates - not measured fuel consumption.
disclosure.body: Figures are derived from tyre pressure and tread condition using rolling-resistance assumptions ({rate}/L, {consumption} L/100km baseline). They indicate the direction and relative scale of tyre-related fuel impact, not actual litres burned. Adjust the assumptions below to match your fleet.

calculator.heading: Compliance Improvement Savings Calculator
calculator.formula: Formula: improvement × 2% fuel per 10% under-inflation × {liters} L/vehicle/month × {fleetSize} vehicles

charts.rrByVehicleSub: Top 20 vehicles - estimated monthly extra fuel cost from under-inflation
charts.treadCorrelation: Tread Depth vs Fuel Impact Correlation
charts.treadCorrelationSub: X: tread depth (mm) · Y: estimated fuel impact % · color by site
charts.trend12MonthSub: Estimated monthly fuel waste cost based on historical tyre data - shows fleet trajectory

env.heading: Environmental Impact - Excess Emissions from Poor Tyre Maintenance

recommendations.heading: Fuel Efficiency Recommendations
recommendations.siteCompliance: Improving pressure compliance at {site} from {from}% to 95% would save ~{value}/month
recommendations.fleetRR: Fleet-wide 1% improvement in rolling resistance = {value} annual saving
recommendations.rotation: Full tyre rotation program compliance could reduce rolling resistance by ~2.5% = {value}/year
recommendations.wornTread: {count} tyres at ≤3mm tread depth are costing ~{value}/month in excess fuel - replace immediately
recommendations.pressureAudit: Fleet average pressure deviation of {pct}% exceeds 10% threshold - systematic inflation audit required

empty.title: No tyre records found
empty.subtitle: Upload tyre data or adjust the country filter to begin fuel analysis.
